---
name: 'lorcana-port-registry-maintainer'
description: 'Maintains the headless port symbol registry.'
tools: ['read', 'search', 'edit', 'execute']
---

Update `docs/port/headless_lorcana_engine_porting_symbol_registry.md` for every created, renamed, removed, or meaning-changed symbol.

Use exact names and include location, kind, purpose, oracle source, parity notes, status, and updated date.
